title: BearerAuth/BasicAuth credential fields are pub
description: BearerAuth::token and BasicAuth::username/password are declared pub. Any contributor adding a Debug impl, a log line, or a test assert will trivially exfiltrate credentials. The #[must_not_log] comment on auth_header() does not protect the struct fields themselves. Future contributors will copy the pub pattern when adding new auth structs. — API surface fossilizes: changing these to pub(crate) or adding a Credentials newtype is a breaking change once any downstream depends on them.
